claim_scope_limit: Mixed CD4/CD8 CTL cluster; supports shared cytotoxic T-cell RNA association, not CD4 specificity, identity, or receptor function.
title: Single-cell transcriptomic and T cell antigen receptor analysis of human cytomegalovirus (hCMV)-specific memory T cells reveals effectors and pre-effectors of CD8(+)- and CD4(+)-cytotoxic T cells.
exact_locator: Results section 'hCMV-reactive CD4-CTLs and CD8-CTLs show similar transcriptomic profile': paragraphs P30-P32; Fig. 5d plots KLRD1 RNA along the CTL trajectory; paragraph P31 identifies higher KLRD1 in CTL pre-effector cluster 4; Fig. 5g and paragraph P32 establish comparable CD4/CD8 representation and broadly shared within-cluster transcriptomes.
proposed_rationale_wording: KLRD1 RNA is associated with a primary human hCMV-reactive cytotoxic T-cell pre-effector program that contains both CD4 and CD8 cells; it is not a CD4-CTL-specific identity marker.
notes: Best exact human source found; stronger and more directly relevant than treating CD94 biology or NK expression as support.

title: Single-Cell Transcriptomic Profiling of MAIT Cells in Patients With COVID-19
exact_locator: Methods 'Defining Cell State Scores' explicitly includes CD38 among nine activation-related genes in a single-cell RNA activation score; Results 'Features of MAIT Cells' and Fig. 3A apply that score; Discussion explicitly distinguishes this RNA-level scoring system from protein-level activation markers.
corroborating_title: Toll-like receptor ligands induce human T cell activation and death, a model for HIV pathogenesis
corroborating_locator: Results 'TLR ligands can induce early activation marker expression,' Fig. 1 (CD4 and CD8 human T cells); Fig. 4B shows induction on purified memory CD4 T cells after overnight poly I:C or anti-CD3 exposure.
proposed_rationale_wording: CD38 has primary human support as an activation-associated T-cell marker and has been used in a human single-cell RNA activation score; within this panel it should be read only as activation-associated RNA, not as identity or mechanism.
notes: Most bounded completion row: direct RNA evidence is module use, while direct induction evidence is protein-level.

claim_scope_limit: MKI67 tracks the cycling/proliferative arm after stimulation and is not activation-specific; any cycling cell can express it.
